title: Even more Fantastic Smelting
description:
A small mod to boost your smelting-experience.
Allows you to smelt raw resource blocks, saving you time and space.
Adds various recipes from the furnace to the blast furnace.
body:
A small mod to boost your smelting-experience.
Allows you to smelt Raw Resource Blocks, saving you time and space.
Adds various recipes from the Furnace to the Blast Furnace.

For Raw Resource Blocks:

- Reduces smelting times by 25%
- Saves you about 90% space
- Reduces XP-gain by about 45%

Adding the following recipes to the Blast Furnace:

- Iron Block
- Gold Block
- Copper Block
- Glass
- Stone
- Smooth Stone
- Dried Kelp
- Bricks
- Nether Bricks
- Terracotta
- Green Dye
